about.title: Who we are
about.subtitle: SG Automotive is an online automotive operation — professional and without unnecessary intermediaries.
about.body: We are a company based in Fuengirola, Costa del Sol, specialised in the purchase, sale, import and advisory of vehicles across Europe. We operate fully remotely, allowing us to work efficiently and without the costs of a traditional dealership.
about.body_2: Our approach is technical, transparent and client-focused. We don't sell by volume: we analyse each case in detail, identify risks and accompany the buyer at every stage of the process.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before starting.

items.question: Do you have a physical store or showroom?
items.answer: No. SG Automotive operates completely online and remotely. All communication, analysis and management is carried out by email, WhatsApp and video call. This allows us to work with greater efficiency and lower cost for the client.

items.question: Can I import a car from Germany, France or another European country?
items.answer: Yes. We manage the import of vehicles from any European Union country to Spain, including purchase, transport, homologation, customs clearance and registration.

items.question: What documentation do I need to import a vehicle?
items.answer: In most cases you will need your DNI or NIE, proof of address in Spain and the vehicle documents (title of ownership, technical sheet and certificate of conformity). We guide you through each step.

items.question: Does the price include all taxes and procedures?
items.answer: The prices of vehicles in our catalogue are the cost price. Import expenses, VAT, registration tax, ITV and transport are detailed separately depending on the type of vehicle and country of origin.

items.question: What does 'VAT reclaimable' mean on vehicles?
items.answer: Some vehicles come from commercial operations and allow you to reclaim VAT if you are self-employed or a company with the right to deduct. It is a significant tax advantage. We indicate which ones apply in each case.

items.question: Do the vehicles come with a warranty?
items.answer: It depends on the vehicle and its origin. Those shown with the 'With warranty' tag include a current manufacturer's warranty or contractual warranty. In other cases we can arrange additional warranty insurance.

items.question: Can I hire you only for the documentary part if I already have the car?
items.answer: Yes. We offer the Documentary Plan, specifically designed to manage registration, ITV, ownership transfer and other procedures if you have already purchased the vehicle yourself.

items.question: How long does the import process take?
items.answer: The complete process usually takes between 3 and 6 weeks from the purchase of the vehicle to the delivery registered in Spain, depending on the country of origin and the current administrative workload.

items.question: Do you serve clients from all over Spain?
items.answer: Yes. Although we are based in Fuengirola, Málaga, we operate remotely and can manage import and delivery to any location in Spain.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Simply write to us via WhatsApp or email with your needs. We will have a free initial consultation to understand your case and explain the most suitable options.
